summary: BrandLogo component system testing - 10/12 features verified working. BrandLogo renders correctly across landing page navbar, admin login, partner login, admin sidebar, partner sidebar, customer sidebar, and invoice drawer. Two issues found: CustomerLoginPage.jsx not used in routes (uses LoginPageV2 instead), and BrandedDocPreview.jsx still uses raw K icon box instead of BrandLogo.

integration_issues.issue: CustomerLoginPage.jsx with AuthBrandHeader is not used - routes use LoginPageV2 instead at /login and /login/customer

issues: Still uses raw K icon box (line 36-38) instead of BrandLogo component - should be updated for consistency

action_items: Consider updating BrandedDocPreview.jsx to use BrandLogo component instead of raw K icon box for consistency
CustomerLoginPage.jsx exists but is not used in routes - either remove the file or update routes to use it
critical_code_review_comments: BrandLogo.jsx correctly implements variant (default/light) and size (xs/sm/md/lg/xl) props
SidebarBrand.jsx correctly wraps BrandLogo with proper styling
AuthBrandHeader.jsx correctly uses BrandLogo with lg size and includes subtitle
BrandLogoFinal.jsx exists but is NOT imported anywhere - can be safely deleted
No remaining BrandLogoFinal imports in codebase
One remaining raw K icon box in BrandedDocPreview.jsx (line 36-38)
CompanySettingsPage.jsx has raw img tag for logo preview - this is expected for admin settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: BrandLogo component system is working correctly across most pages. Landing navbar, admin login, partner login, admin sidebar, partner sidebar, customer sidebar, and invoice drawer all show BrandLogo correctly. Two minor issues: 1) CustomerLoginPage.jsx is not used in routes (LoginPageV2 is used instead), 2) BrandedDocPreview.jsx still uses raw K icon box. BrandLogoFinal.jsx can be safely deleted as it has no imports.

LANDING_NAVBAR_LOGO.details: BrandLogo renders with default variant (konekt-logo-full.png) and md size (h-10)

ADMIN_LOGIN_LOGO.details: BrandLogo renders with light variant (konekt-logo-white.png), lg size (h-14), centered (mx-auto)

PARTNER_LOGIN_LOGO.details: AuthBrandHeader with BrandLogo (lg size, default variant) and subtitle 'Sign in to manage your Konekt allocation'

CUSTOMER_LOGIN_LOGO.details: CustomerLoginPage.jsx exists with AuthBrandHeader but routes use LoginPageV2 instead. LoginPageV2 has BrandLogo but not AuthBrandHeader.

ADMIN_SIDEBAR_LOGO.details: SidebarBrand with BrandLogo renders in admin sidebar (light variant for dark sidebar)

PARTNER_SIDEBAR_LOGO.details: BrandLogo renders in partner sidebar with default variant and md size (h-10)

CUSTOMER_SIDEBAR_LOGO.details: BrandLogo renders in customer sidebar with default variant and md size (h-10)

INVOICE_DRAWER_LOGO.details: BrandLogo renders in invoice drawer header with light variant (h-8) and sm size

ORDER_DRAWER_LOGO.details: Order drawer not tested - similar implementation expected

NO_BRANDLOGOFINAL_IMPORTS.details: No BrandLogoFinal imports found in codebase

NO_RAW_K_ICON_BOXES.details: One remaining K icon box in BrandedDocPreview.jsx (line 36-38)

ALL_LOGIN_FLOWS_WORK.details: Customer, admin, and partner login flows all work correctly after logo changes
